response.justification: Candidate is a strong hands-on full-stack software craftsman with ~14-15 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) at re:cinq. However, the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale, cloud platform strategy depth, and executive-level advisory experience with strategic customers — none of which are evidenced in the resume. Experience is concentrated at senior IC level on product engineering, with limited signals of org-wide technical leadership, AI research/product authority, or cloud platform strategy at the scale this role demands.
strengths: ~14-15 years of polyglot full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience with strong testing/TDD discipline
Recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks
Track record of building and shipping products end-to-end (GISCollective platform, Apple TV app, high-throughput data services)
concerns: No demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale or recognized AI expertise expected for a Principal AI Strategy role
Limited evidence of Director-level influence, advising strategic customers/partners, or shaping cloud platform strategy
Cloud depth appears limited to AWS CDK product work; no signals of cross-cutting cloud architecture leadership

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / demonstrated AI products
No Director-level IC or strategic advisory experience
Strong engineering craftsmanship and recent AI-agent tooling work
